disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Bilateral, symmetrical pain and stiffness across both shoulder and both hip/buttock girdles, markedly worse after rest and first thing, easing a little with warmth and gentle movement
trigger_question_examples: Where exactly is the pain and stiffness?
Is it on both sides, and when is it worst?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's both shoulders and both hips at the same time, right across the top of my shoulders and my buttocks. It's worst after I've been sitting or lying still, and warming up and moving gently takes the edge off a little.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reports normal strength and feeling in the hands and feet, can grip and wiggle toes, no numbness or pins-and-needles, and no loss of bladder or bowel control
trigger_question_examples: Can you grip normally and move your fingers and toes?
Any numbness, pins and needles, or trouble controlling your bladder or bowels?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My hands and feet feel completely normal — I can grip fine and wiggle my toes. No numbness or tingling, and no trouble with my waterworks or bowels. It's the big muscles of my shoulders and hips that won't work because of the pain.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No visual disturbance or loss of vision, no new one-sided or temple headache, no scalp tenderness when brushing hair, and no jaw ache or fatigue when chewing
trigger_question_examples: Any change in your vision, or a new headache over your temple?
Is your scalp tender, or does your jaw ache when you chew?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my vision is fine, I haven't got a headache, my scalp isn't sore, and my jaw is fine when I eat.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No recent fall, trauma, or injury; onset was bilateral and symmetrical with no mechanism
trigger_question_examples: Did you have any fall, twist, or injury before this started?
Did anything trigger it, or did it just come on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I didn't fall or hurt myself. It just came on in both shoulders and hips at once after I'd been resting.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever or feeling unwell systemically; the paracetamol taken regularly has given no relief at all
trigger_question_examples: Any fevers, sweats, or feeling generally unwell?
Have your painkillers helped at all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers and I don't feel sick in myself. The paracetamol hasn't touched it — it's done nothing.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Acute inability to mobilise, dress, or self-care tonight in an older adult who lives alone with no one present to help
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone with you who can help tonight?
Are you able to move around and look after yourself right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I live on my own and there's no one here. I can't get up out of the chair or dress myself, so I'm really stuck tonight.
